title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 537.687 - Medical records submitted, when — violation, penalty
text:
537.687.  Medical records submitted, when — violation, penalty. — 1.  Upon request by the division for verification of injuries of victims, a medical provider shall submit medical records and other information requested by the division.  Any costs to the claimant for obtaining and providing such information may be submitted as part of the claim.
  2.  Failure to submit the information as required by this section shall be an infraction.
(L. 2001 H.B. 107)
